name: Shenzhen Fine Made Electronics Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Fine Made Electronics Group Co., Ltd. engages in the design, development, packaging, testing, and sale of analog and digital-analog hybrid integrated circuits in China. Its products are used in power management class, LED lights, LED control and drivers, MCU class, audio amplifiers, MOSFET class, infrared remote control, and others. Shenzhen Fine Made Electronics Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
